demo.title: grantr-mcp-flow.sh
demo.code:
# Connect your agent's MCP client to https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp
# Public discovery tools, usable before account setup:
# - grantr_get_capabilities
# - grantr_get_execution_targets

# Example user prompt after install:
# "Use my Bankr wallet to open a USDC Savings Position in a Grantr vault."
# Expected flow: resolve wallet context -> list live savings -> prepare unsigned deposit transactions -> present preview -> Bankr or another wallet provider signs only after explicit approval.

# If Grantr account setup is required, send the user to:
# https://grantr.id/agent/setup?source=bankr

setup: Install the skill and connect your agent MCP client to `https://mcp.grantr.id/mcp`.
Use only public discovery tools until the MCP session is tied to a registered Grantr account.
When account setup is required, send the user to `https://grantr.id/agent/setup?source=bankr`; include only non-secret wallet/context query parameters when available.
If Bankr wallet context is present, use it as the active funding/signing wallet after Grantr MCP confirms it; otherwise use the provider-agnostic wallet context.
For savings or withdrawals, prepare unsigned transactions through Grantr MCP and require explicit wallet-provider approval before signing or broadcast.
